---
title: "nitrix.register.recipes"
generated: true
signature-hash: 7c88c392f4401d65
description: "Pairwise rigid / affine registration recipes."
listing:
  id: nitrix-register-recipes-symbols
  contents: "nitrix-register-recipes/*.qmd"
  type: table
  fields: [title, description]
  sort: "title"
  filter-ui: false
  page-size: 500
---

::: {.callout-important title="Generated reference stub — fill me"}
Auto-generated scaffold for `nitrix.register.recipes`. Fill the prose *outside* the
generated markers; do **not** ship as-is (SPEC §6.5). `check_reference_staleness.py` flags signature drift.
:::

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:__module__ -->
Pairwise rigid / affine registration recipes.

Pure functions `(moving, fixed) -> RegistrationResult`, following the same
convention as [`nitrix.stats.reml_fit`](nitrix-stats.qmd) (a `NamedTuple` of
arrays, no PyTree module, no atlas or file I/O).  They compose the shared
registration substrate -- the resolution pyramid, the similarity metric, the
transform parametrisation, and the matrix-free optimiser -- with the
orchestration living here so that `entense` can wrap it (or re-implement it)
without re-deriving it.

The representative algorithm is intensity-based Gauss-Newton /
Levenberg-Marquardt on the rigid / affine Lie groups (the `3dvolreg` / AIR
lineage): coarse-to-fine, second-order, and differentiable.  The similarity
metric ([`SSD`](nitrix-register/SSD.qmd) by default;
[`LNCC`](nitrix-register/LNCC.qmd) / [`MI`](nitrix-register/MI.qmd) /
[`CorrelationRatio`](nitrix-register/CorrelationRatio.qmd) for intensity-robust or cross-modal
cases) and the schedule are set on the [`RegistrationSpec`](nitrix-register/RegistrationSpec.qmd).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen dims:__page__ -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `*mspatial` | a variadic group of axes (`mspatial`) |
| `*fspatial` | a variadic group of axes (`fspatial`) |
| `*spatial` | the spatial axes of a grid (variadic) |
| `*rspatial` | a variadic group of axes (`rspatial`) |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

## Symbols

::: {#nitrix-register-recipes-symbols}
:::
